'''Gathal Danager''' was a free-trader during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], he met [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] on [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]], who took a bet that he could defeat a band of space [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]s, the [[Norulac Freebooters]]. Gathal Danager lost the bet with Calrissian's victory at the [[Battle of Taanab/Legends|Battle of Taanab]] and Danager lost the deed of a small [[Clendor]]an brewery to Calrissian.{{Fact}}
